meaning: n.进攻,攻击,(用语言)抨击,批评,疾病发作,侵袭vt.攻击,抨击,动手处理(某事)vi.攻击
examples: The attack on Charles was unjust.
He commanded his troops to attack.
The defenders drove off each attack.
They were fleeing an attack by the Janjaweed, the dreaded Arab militia backed by Sudan's government.
No-one has claimed responsibility for the Tripoli attack - and investigations are under way.
